summary: Phase 3 testing complete: All 6 backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend testing completed for all 12 user stories with excellent results. New logo applied, dark cinematic theme verified, old assets removed (no br97rzjk or csyvb5r6), Storybook and Invest pages functional, all navigation and email links working.
